examples.pt: Eu ouço música todos os dias
examples.en: I listen to music every day
You listen to music very loud
She listens to the radio in the morning

examples.pt: Nós ouvimos notícias todos os dias
examples.en: We listen to news every day
They listen to music in silence

examples.pt: Ela plantou a semente no jardim
examples.en: She planted the seed in the garden

examples.pt: Ela dá-me esperança para o futuro
examples.en: She gives me hope for the future

examples.pt: A água é escassa no deserto
examples.en: Water is scarce in the desert

examples.pt: Eu seduzo as pessoas com facilidade.
Tu seduzes com um simples sorriso.
examples.en: You seduce with a simple smile.

examples.pt: Ela seduz com a sua voz.
Vocês seduzem com a vossa simpatia.
A tormenta está a aproximar-se da costa portuguesa
examples.en: The storm is approaching the Portuguese coast

examples.pt: A algema prendia o seu pulso
Sinto muito lamento pelo que aconteceu
examples.en: I'm deeply sorry for what happened
You are reborn with each challenge.
She is reborn after each fall.

examples.pt: O meu destino é viajar pelo mundo.
examples.en: My destiny is to travel the world.
I will become a happy person

present.en: I make many mistakes in football
You always get the door wrong
She makes a mistake in the bill

present.pt: Vocês erram menos do que eu
present.en: You make fewer mistakes than I

past.en: I made mistakes on the test.
You made a mistake in the answer.
We made a mistake in the calculation.

examples.en: Good morning, how are you today?
Good morning, I'm going to work
Good morning, how can I help

examples.pt: Bom dia, está um dia lindo
examples.en: Good morning, it's a beautiful day
I'm going to the dentist on Friday

examples.pt: Ela é casada há cinco anos
examples.en: She has been married for five years
The height of the building impresses

examples.pt: A minha gorda cadela come muito
examples.en: My fat dog eats a lot

examples.pt: O meu amigo fica em Lisboa

future.en: I will go to the park
You will go to the movies
We will go to the beach
You will go to the restaurant
They will go to the stadium

examples.pt: O conteúdo do livro é muito interessante
examples.en: The content of the book is very interesting

examples.pt: Preciso de sono para me sentir bem
examples.en: I need sleep to feel good

examples.pt: O aumento foi significativo nos últimos anos
examples.en: The increase was significant in recent years
I'm going to begin the project tomorrow
